name: Ria Money Transfer Agent
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance service enabling fast money transfers to 190+ countries through 600,000+ locations with multiple send and receive options.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer has operated for over 35 years as an established international money transfer provider. The company specializes in facilitating remittances and cross-border payments for customers sending money to family and friends worldwide. According to their website, they have completed over a billion transfers and maintain partnerships with 600,000+ payout locations across 190+ countries and territories.

Ria offers multiple channels to send money: online through their website, via mobile app, in person at physical agent locations, and through WhatsApp for select countries. Recipients can receive funds through bank deposits, cash pickup, digital wallets, home delivery, or ATM withdrawal. The service operates with over 100 currencies and advertises competitive exchange rates. They provide real-time transfer tracking and promote a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

The company differentiates itself through its extensive agent network (600,000+ locations), multi-channel sending options including WhatsApp integration, mobile app functionality with repeat-transfer convenience features, and a long operational history claiming trusted experience. They also engage in sponsorships (Mexican National Team) and maintain high app ratings (4.9 stars on iOS, 4.8 on Google Play, 4.5 on Trustpilot).

However, the website provides minimal transparency on fees beyond a sample rate showing $1.99 USD transfer fee to Mexico, lacks detailed information about exchange rate markups, does not prominently display regulatory compliance details, and offers no pricing calculator accessible without initiating a transfer. The service targets remittance senders rather than domestic financial services, positioning it distinctly within the money transfer category rather than traditional banking or lending.
address: Monte Financial Services Llc, 3920 S 27th St, Milwaukee, WI 53221

company_info.headquarters: Monte Financial Services Llc, 3920 S 27th St, Milwaukee, WI 53221

pros: Extensive global network of 600,000+ cash pickup locations across 190+ countries enables broad accessibility
Multiple send channels including online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp for flexible transaction methods
Competitive promotional rates advertised (sample: $1.99 fee to Mexico on debit card transfers)
Real-time transfer tracking available for all transactions
High user satisfaction ratings: 4.9/5 on iOS, 4.8/5 on Google Play, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot
Over 35 years of operational history and claim of 1+ billion completed transfers
Multiple receive options (bank deposit, cash, digital wallet, ATM, home delivery) for recipient flexibility
cons: Website displays minimal fee transparency—only sample rates shown; full fee structure requires initiating transfer
Exchange rate markup information not disclosed on homepage or easily accessible pricing pages
Limited regulatory compliance or licensing information visible on public website
Mobile app and online platform require user registration before rate quotes accessible
No explicit information about delivery timeframes (claimed as 'fast' but specific windows not stated)
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates regularly sending money to family in multiple countries
Individuals seeking cash pickup options in countries with limited banking infrastructure
Users preferring multiple send channels (online, mobile app, in-person, WhatsApp) for convenience
Customers with existing Ria locations nearby for in-person cash payments
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best suited for individuals regularly sending international remittances who value extensive cash pickup networks and flexible send/receive options across 190+ countries. The main caveat is limited fee and exchange rate transparency upfront—customers must initiate transactions or contact support to understand full costs, and the service targets cross-border remittance rather than domestic financial services.
services: In-person cash payments at agent locations
WhatsApp money transfer to select countries
